_comment: Multi-week rotating focus within each daily theme. Cycle position is calendar-derived: (date.toordinal() // 7) % cycle_length per weekday — stateless and predictable. Saturday (5) is intentionally absent: Cariboo Local Affairs stays broad and acts as the release valve for urgent local stories. Focus keywords narrow the base theme; base theme keywords remain the fallback when a focus week is thin.

cycle.name: Film & Screen
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is film and screen media — who is making moving pictures in and about rural places, and how streaming economics and production tools change that.

cycle.name: Music & Live Performance
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is music and live performance — the economics and tech of making, recording, and staging music and theatre far from the big-city circuit.

cycle.name: Visual Arts & Heritage
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is visual arts and heritage — galleries, museums, makers, and how communities preserve and show their visual culture.

cycle.name: Writing, Journalism & Podcasting
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is the written and spoken word — local journalism, books, and podcasting, and who sustains storytelling infrastructure in small communities.

cycle.name: Agriculture & Ranching
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is agriculture and ranching — who grows and raises food on Cariboo working lands, and how technology, markets, and climate reshape that work.

cycle.name: Forestry & Timber
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is forestry — timber supply, mills, tenure, and how the forest economy adapts as the industry restructures.

cycle.name: Mining & Energy
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is mining and energy — extraction, permitting, reclamation, and who captures the value from what comes out of the ground.

cycle.name: Tourism & the Outdoor Economy
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is tourism and the outdoor economy — the businesses that turn landscape into livelihood, from guest ranches to guiding, and what sustains them.

cycle.name: Maker & Repair
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is making and repairing — building, modifying, and fixing your own gear instead of replacing it.

cycle.name: Homestead & Off-Grid Tech
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is homestead and off-grid technology — power, connectivity, and self-reliance systems for rural properties where the grid is thin.

cycle.name: Digital Life & Security
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is digital life and security — scams, breaches, privacy, and the practical habits that keep rural households and small businesses safe online.

cycle.name: Vehicles & Field Gear
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is vehicles and field gear — the machines and equipment that get work done and get people into the backcountry, and what it's like to own and maintain them.

cycle.name: Governance, Title & Treaty
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is governance, title, and treaty — who holds decision-making power over lands and data, and how title and self-government are being asserted in practice.

cycle.name: Language & Culture
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is language and cultural revitalization — how communities are bringing languages and cultural practice back to strength, and the tools helping or hindering.

cycle.name: Economic Development
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is Indigenous-led economic development — businesses, partnerships, and revenue models where Nations set the terms.

cycle.name: Guardians & Land Stewardship
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is guardians and land stewardship — Indigenous-led monitoring, restoration, and care of territory, and the science and technology woven into it.

cycle.name: Wildfire & Climate Resilience
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is wildfire and climate resilience — how communities and landscapes prepare for, live through, and recover from fire and a changing climate.

cycle.name: Wildlife & Conservation
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is wildlife and conservation — the animals that define these landscapes, the state of their populations, and what protecting them asks of people.

cycle.name: Recreation & Backcountry Access
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is recreation and backcountry access — how people get out into wild places, and the trails, roads, and rules that shape that access.

cycle.name: Sky & Cosmos
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is the sky and cosmos — astronomy, aurora, and space science as seen from dark rural skies.

cycle.name: The Living World
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is the living world — the biology and ecology of species and ecosystems, and what field research reveals about how they work.

cycle.name: Earth Systems & Climate Science
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is earth systems — geology, water, ice, and climate science, and how the physical world under our feet is changing.

cycle.name: Discovery, Health & How Science Works
cycle.lens: This week's rotation focus is discovery and the practice of science itself — health research, physics, citizen science, and how we come to know what we know.
